summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 fixes for Abdul Azis portfolio: (1) Sidebar active state symmetry with flush 3px blue left border, (2) Cursor glow without cursor-dot and keeping default cursor, (3) Scroll-based active menu with IntersectionObserver. All fixes verified successfully with proper implementation.
passed_tests: FIX 1 - Sidebar active state: Blue background rgba(37,99,235,0.15) applied correctly
FIX 1 - Sidebar active state: 3px solid blue left border (#2563EB) flush to sidebar edge (0px offset)
FIX 1 - Sidebar active state: All nav items have equal height of 48px
FIX 1 - Sidebar active state: Only one nav item active at a time
FIX 1 - Sidebar active state: No old floating bar element found
FIX 2 - Cursor glow: No cursor-dot element exists
FIX 2 - Cursor glow: Body does NOT have cursor:none (default cursor visible)
FIX 2 - Cursor glow: cursor-glow element exists with correct data-testid
FIX 2 - Cursor glow: cursor-glow has correct size (80px x 80px)
FIX 2 - Cursor glow: cursor-glow has pointer-events:none
FIX 3 - Scrollspy: All sections have correct IDs (home, projects, experience, tech-stack, education, contact)
FIX 3 - Scrollspy: Scrolling to projects automatically activates nav-projects-link
FIX 3 - Scrollspy: Scrolling to experience automatically activates nav-experience-link
FIX 3 - Scrollspy: Scrolling to tech-stack automatically activates nav-tech-stack-link
FIX 3 - Scrollspy: Scrolling to education automatically activates nav-education-link
FIX 3 - Scrollspy: Scrolling to contact automatically activates nav-contact-link
FIX 3 - Scrollspy: Home section behavior correct (sidebar hides at top as designed)
REGRESSION - Nav click smooth-scrolls to section and highlights correctly
REGRESSION - Project card title button opens detail modal
REGRESSION - No top-header element exists
REGRESSION - Theme toggle works correctly (dark/light mode switch)
